_comment: Replace these values with your brand's design system. Colors are exposed as CSS variables to templates/slide.css at composition time. Font families must match files self-hosted in templates/fonts/.

colors._comment: Add as many semantic color slots as your slide template references. The CSS variable name is derived from the JSON key: 'primary' becomes --color-primary.

slide_dimensions._comment: Instagram 4:5 portrait. Don't change unless you also update templates/slide.css.

carousel._comment: How many slides per carousel. The Claude prompt enforces this exactly. Instagram allows up to 20.
